review_text: Nice park close to the beach, excellent movie room and kitchen. Very tidy amenities and close to the beach
Always love staying here, great place

Stayed in an ensuite powered suite in a campervan. Plenty of room to set up. It was a clean site but the ensuite just needed a paint and something over the old window to stop the bugs getting in. Camp kitchen was tidy. Staff was friendly and helpful  especially the guy that fixed the aircon in the games room. Just needs a deep clean in shared spaces and I would have given it a 5 star. I would return.

The park is well located and the management are really trying to provide a higher level of accommodation. There are some signs of wear such as the screen door lock faulty/unlockable (see photos) which was reported to reception. They said maintenance would look at it but that did not happen. One of the internal door locks was falling off (see photos) The reception staff were extremely kind and courteous. There are extra touches and kitchen utensils above and beyond similar parks and there was even stevia sweetener.

I was staying at a motel room and tried to extend but the motels were booked out for the dates I wanted. So I booked a cabin at a higher price. I the. Got a call from Kylie asking if I wanted to stay in the same room. I said it’s fine as long as I’m refunded the difference. She refused so I said I would take the cabin I paid for. This is akin to a bait and switch. Regardless I will be reporting this attempt at a racket to the ACCC.
設備齊全，衛生情況令人滿意，附近有大公園
We booked the studio cabin, it was clean and spacious enough for 2 with parking onsite. Kitchenette is well equipped with essentials - bring your own seasoning! We enjoyed our 3 nights stay here.
Very friendly staff and very clean facilities

One of the worst cabins we have been in. Very unclean. The shower alcove was full of mould. The tv had lines through it (was replaced with no remote control, had to hunt for one)  basin hot water tap couldnt turn on, replaced taps & spout. Following day no hot water. Had to call a plumber as the handyman couldnt fix it. Cobwebs, marks on all the walls. Celing fans dirty. Lots of other faults i could name. It set us back on our excursions for the day waiting around to fix the problems. No apoligies from the Manager or staff. Wont be backt
Super  friendly staff, great location, esp to beach, just wonderful...soo easy, great prlice,

We arrived confused ? A big fire truck obsquired our view of notice sighn
Ok on entering booking office I was ignord by starf
Ok I had to waite untill a confused client cleared her accunt
Hope I have a great holiday

We had a great stay at Discovery Parks Warrnambool. The shared bathrooms (both male and female), kitchen, and laundry were kept very clean at all times, which made a big difference to the experience.

Other campers were respectful and the park was quiet and peaceful.

The shared herb garden was a lovely touch, and it’s clear the park puts a lot of effort into maintaining the facilities. We were very happy with our stay!

Expensive. Decent sites, small but nice since there is a slab. No shade at all. Kitchen closed at 9, went to cook dinner to my surprise that I wouldn’t have any that night. I think its ridiculous to close a kitchen at 9. I understand that it may annoy others but a microwave would be a minimum. Paying for a bit of grass and a kitchen and neither getting a kitchen or shade is absurd. Wont be back

Location is great but that’s where it ends|We have a  21 ft van, entered details on website when booking but when we arrived  the allocated site was way too small.  We did eventually get allocated a site that we were able to just fit. No apologies for inconvenience. We also booked it in advance for what we thought was a sale price. Had to pay for site twice ! Management was happy for us to drive off and find alternative accommodation!|Take home message for others booking if your set up is over 20 ft be cautious as this park is small with tight sites.  Management don’t really care and customer service is not their priority

Great spot in the south of Warrnambool, much preferred this than staying in the city centre.
Nice walking distance to the water.
All the amenities you need.
Bed was too soft, extremely uncomfortable and way too much light in bedroom from ill fitted curtains. It was a quiet park ordinarily but they pack you in like sardines
Very clean park friendly staff

Had our first holiday in our new van in Oct25 and had a wonderful experience with this park as part of a travel auction. However when trying to book the 2nd part of it, I encountered a very dismissive, rude and uninterested woman on the phone, who unsurprisingly her name was Karen…, and lost my second part of my travel auction. So disappointed. Won’t come back again.

Wir haben uns den Campingplatz im Vorfeld ausgesucht, weil er besonders schön gelegen und von vielen Reiseführern und positiven Bewertungen hervorgehoben wurde. Leider wollten wir einen Tag vorher reservieren, was zu spät war. Alle Campingplätze waren bereits vergriffen. Das sollten Reisenden berücksichtigen.
Great friendly service, very helpful and accommodating. Clean and neat 2 bedroom unit for five people. (2adults, & 3 teens)

The shower and hand wash liquid in the shower was empty. We had to step out dripping wet of the shower cubicle to access the one next to the vanity unit. Housekeeping should check and refill or replace empty ones.

Don't book your ticket directly from discovery park website. Book from other platform.
Very rude staff, not at all helpfull and once you booked the ticket from their website dont expect any type of help from them.
I had very bad experience, keep e-mail them and their reply was our manager will call you and never ever recieved any call.  So, go to other platform and you will get better deals and free cancellation.
Best rooms,best service and beautiful location I m so happy to stay in discovery park thank you for everything
A decent place for holiday stay in Warnambool. However the amenities, swimming pool, play areas were not that great as they were at the discovery parks Echuca.
Not worth the $100 at all tight cramped together campsites toilets where okay not very clean for the price though
Really good place to stay. Rooms are a bit old but still function nicely. Most activities to do at Warrnambool are only a few minutes away. It is also pretty good for the price.
A wonderful place for a relaxing holiday. Booking was very easy and hassle-free. The Scenic Avenue, Warrnambool location is lovely and adds to the overall experience. Would definitely stay again!

I really liked this place.  The room was clean and well presented even if it was getting a bit dated.  It had a cook top,  microwave and big fridge. The tv was mounted so it is moveable and you can watch it from the bed or the couch. The location is close to town and really easy to get to shops.  Although we didn't have the grandkids with us this time we didn't realise it was a two room unit so would have been excellent if the kids were with us.  I would definitely stay here again.
Great place, friendly owners, and close to everything.

We booked a room for 2 nights. It was not communicated that no fresh towel would provided the following night. The lady on phone (after hour) told me towel change is only available for 7-day consecutive booking, which was a standard for all Discovery Parks nation-wide. She did ask me to call in the reception the following morning but we had left already.

We booked and paid for our powered site pet friendly which was available online. We got booking conformation and drove all the way from Sydney to receive call few hours of our check-in that our booking was canceled because they don't have anymore pet friendly sites!

They ruined our holidays and very long drive. All others parka was fully booked so now we will need to stay overnight on the car parking! Totally unacceptable and the lady didn't even apologized on the phone!

DON'T USE THIS PARK IF YOU DON'T WANT TO FIND OUT FEW HOURS BEFORE OF CHECK IN THAT YOU ARE CANCELED!!!

We got the two bed budget cabin. Well priced for what it is. Beds were comfy. Well appointed but looking dated and tired. We had to deal with a lot of ants upon check in.
The park is well located, close to the beach and cafes however the cabins are very close to each other so there was a bit of noise.
Overall, it's a nice stay. But the shower door is broken and we couldn't really find a way to switch off the fan
River site. Lovely park
The cabin we were in no 114 the kitchen window looked into a galvanised fence. If we sat on the decking we looked into a horrible big brick wall.  The cabins were very close together. .
Nice area neat and tidy. Good for what i need. Close to services.
It's easy to find, close to the beach and river—a nice, budget-friendly place. I would come back next time. Thank you
Every nice  quiet, clean and handy to most things
Nice place to stay. Almost freshly painted 2 Bedroom Cabin we stayed in. Very. Very. Comfy Beds. Friendly Staff. Quiet Location.

Excellent location. Walk across Pertobe Rd to the foreshore and Kiosk cafe. Walking distance to city centre. We were there over Melb Cup long weekend and the park was crowded with families and caravans so it must be popular with families which is understandable given all the facilities to entertain children within the park and within a short walking distance or bike ride. Book early. We were in a ‘Budget Studio Cabin’ and the pictures showed the standard dated brown cabins usually found in caravan parks. But we were pleasantly surprised with a new very spacious white interior cabin. Wide deck area. Clean. All amenities provided. Full size fridge. Spacious bathroom. Foldable clothes rack. Ample room to move around, relax and enjoy a long stay.

Wonderful cabins! Clean, neat and comfortable. Great service! Really appreciated being able to get a cabin last minute. Terrific amenities available. Short walk to the beach so a great location. Highly recommend!

While driving though Warrnambool we decided to stop in a cabin for a few days while some bad weather passed.  Thanks to Kellie for sorting out our upgraded cabin after our initial enquiry, the place was clean, spacious and perfect for a base touring round the area.

Jason and Kylie are the most accommodating hosts. They run the Park very very well with excellent communication making sure checkin is seamless.

Perfect location close to everything we needed.

Even a late night rainy checkin was no hassle for them at all.

6 stars!!

Our second stopover for the tour of Victoria where the next venture was driving the Great Ocean road. This accommodation was won in the Travel auctions bid. The room was clean and the bed was comfortable. The only downside was access. Such narrow laneways to get to any site would be difficult for caravan owners. There were a number of times we had to reverse back and find another way to exit the park due to others arriving and departing.
Canon hill has a historical touch

Was not a well looked after as most we have stayed at, sites are so packed together, concrete pad for our transit was not big enough, l think spoiled by the manicured grounds at mount gambia caravan park, cant comment on facilities
Every thing was great 👍
Got the executive cabin. Really good size. Comfortable stay with two teenagers. Clean and friendly service.

Room is better priced and well equipped compared to other accomodations on Agoda for 4 persons (2 single beds and 1 double bed) and well equipped room.

They also have swimming pools, playground, movie room and BBQ area.

There is a shuttle bus to city centre or you can book Uber.

It is also convenient if you do the Deep Blue hot springs since it is within walking distance.

Took our van and very happy with site. Heated pool was very popular as enclosed so windy wet day didn't stop the kids having fun. Clean ablution block and sites had even fake grass base so stopped the mud being bought in.

Love the site. Rooms are pretty old but space is great.

Kids could rent bikes or other activities to do.

They are just minutes away from everything.
“We stayed at Discovery Park Warrnambool and had a great time. The villa was clean, comfortable, and well set up. Very family-friendly and a nice place to relax.”
Please choose other holiday parks if you can. It’s written on their cancellation policy that you can request for a booking credit if you need to cancel your booking. But they will never give.

Hang your head in shame Discovery / G’Day Parks…., LOOK at the photos.

The place was a disgusting muddy bog hole.

Absolutely shocking.

Look at the photos Discovery / G’Day Parks.

I personally had to pick up and help a senior caravaner up and out of the mud who slipped in the quagmire after backing in his van. His wife was physically distraught and he was totally shocked and embarrassed.

Look at the photos.

No attempts were made by park yard staff in the whole week we stayed here, to clean this sad mess up.

The “caravan park” section is a rundown filthy mess. The sites as you can see from the photos, are a genuine safety hazard.

The drains are full of mud, the grass (what’s there) is long and unkempt, overgrown garden beds are full of weeds, cigarette buts and rubbish.

Look at the photos Discovery / G’Day Parks and convince me and others that this is acceptable as a “chain park” quality that you are proud of…
Room is a bit run down.
Out of way although close the beach. A tight little park. Qell serviced and the staff quite helpful

We’ve only just arrived here and so far, so good.

We couldn’t find the remote for the air con and called the office and within minutes, someone was here to help us locate it.

The cabin is very clean and tidy, very modern and up to date.

So far, there aren’t any complaints.

Would I stay there again? Absolutely!!!!
Cheap affordable cabins, clean and bright. Very close walk to the beach and easy short drive to town 😄. Recommended to anyone Cheers
Good location & comfy bed, our cabin unfortunately was near the busy road.Very dated accommodation & wifi didn’t connect in the all time we were there.

We booked a few weeks ago advising we have a 20' caravan with a long draw bar. When we were given our site no and drove to it, there is a small tree in the back of the site and is suitable for a small van only. When we requested another suitably sized site they gave us a site covered in mud and water. Worst site l've ever encountered in a caravan park in the last 10 years of camping. It was no use asking for an alternative as the others vacant were similar or worse. The Discovery management needs to spend some money on drainage and a firm base for their Warrnambool caravan sites. We've been staying in SA and Victoria over the past 3 weeks and the other parks including the Discovery ones have encountered the same weather and were nothing like this mud heap, so no excuse This park is very reasonably priced but not worth having to walk onto your site trudging mud into your caravan.

“I was working in the area and stayed at Discovery Parks Warrnambool. The whole booking and check-in process was easy and straightforward. I only stayed briefly — arrived for a couple of hours and left early the next morning — but everything was set up perfectly. The cabin was preheated for me, neat and tidy, very clean, and had plenty of blinds to block out light so I got a great night’s sleep. It was quiet and comfortable, making it an ideal place to stay when working out of town.”
Stayed in a two bedroom cabin. Very clean and well set up.
Clean tidy and family friendly Park.The room was warm and clean. Thank you
Friendly staff. The cabin and toilet are clean and tidy. This is a good place for a short break or holiday. I will return :)

Traveller photos (126)
Add photos

Bedroom after I'd cleaned it. The walls are all marked and dirty. Photos don't do the grim justice.

All the tiles have ingrained mould and dirt.

Kitchen skirting around stove top after I had scrubbed it clean.

Typical example of the condition of the fixtures in this cabin.

Spa - photos do not do the grime, mould and yellowed old fixtures justice.

All fixtures are either rusted or such yellowing brittle plastic they snap or seemingly cannot be cleaned.

Bedroom wall example. So dusty in the ridges.

Photographs much better than it is in real life. Thick dust and mould on the top and edges of each ceiling fan blade

Lounge/ kitchen and the bedroom have dirty dusty and ill matching curtains.

Filthy toilet on arrival

This photo is a typical example of all of the skirting, walls, corners in the lounge/ kitchen, bedroom and bathroom.

Not appealing to bath in!

See all photos Jodie
wrote a review
8 contributions
Melbourne, Australia

1 week ago
Filthy! Not fit to be let out.
We paid extra for the one bedroom Spa Cabin and it was not as pictured on their website. The cabin has potential but needs a deep deep clean and probably a paint and replacement of fixtures. Taps, hinges and fixtures are rusted, old and brittle. We couldn't use the ceiling fans because they were too filthy to risk turning on. The shower is in the spa so the bottom of the spa has stains and an ugly vibe of other people's feet. The long term dirt and filth in the bathroom makes it a place you'd rather not step into at all, let alone relax in a spa! Previous guests hair shavings were over sink, their marks in toilet bowl and hair on toilet seat on our arrival. All the skirting boards are stained covered in long term dirt. We had 2 white tail spiders in the lounge come out from the curtains. The curtains are dusty and hung in an ugly way, with old floor length lace backing curtains and half length thick curtains on the top. I used my pegs to hold the curtains together to keep light out because they were falling apart in the centre. The positives were  - a friendly reception staff member, new'ish and clean fridge, clean and working oven ( inside the oven but edges of knobs and benches filthy) and the mattress was comfortable. Overall this cabin is a very unpleasant space to be in because of how badly it is maintained and how very filthy the basic environment is. I cleaned everything thoroughly on arrival but much of the filth is so deep seated my efforts made little impact. It's definitely not as advertised. Avoid staying here unless you are certain Discovery Parks have made some HUGE cleanliness and aesthetic changes. Currently it is disgusting, incredibly over priced and not functional.

We paid extra for the one bedroom Spa Cabin and it was not as pictured on their website. The cabin has potential but needs a deep deep clean and probably a paint and replacement of fixtures. Taps, hinges and fixtures are rusted, old and brittle. We couldn't use the ceiling fans because they were too filthy to risk turning on. The shower is in the spa so the bottom of the spa has stains and an ugly vibe of other people's feet. The long term dirt and filth in the bathroom makes it a place you'd rather not step into at all, let alone relax in a spa! Previous guests hair shavings were over sink, their marks in toilet bowl and hair on toilet seat on our arrival. All the skirting boards are stained covered in long term dirt. We had 2 white tail spiders in the lounge come out from the curtains. The curtains are dusty and hung in an ugly way, with old floor length lace backing curtains and half length thick curtains on the top. I used my pegs to hold the curtains together to keep light out because they were falling apart in the centre. The positives were  - a friendly reception staff member, new'ish and clean fridge, clean and working oven ( inside the oven but edges of knobs and benches filthy) and the mattress was comfortable. Overall this cabin is a very unpleasant space to be in because of how badly it is maintained and how very filthy the basic environment is. I cleaned everything thoroughly on arrival but much of the filth is so deep seated my efforts made little impact. It's definitely not as advertised. Avoid staying here unless you are certain Discovery Parks have made some HUGE cleanliness and aesthetic changes. Currently it is disgusting, incredibly over priced and not functional.
Very clean tidy and up to comfortable cabins at very reasonable prices Loved our stay there Staff very helpful and friendly Goi g back next year for lo ger stay

We booked a standard Motel room, first of all the staff are excellent, great customer service. The So called standard motel room was amazing to say the least. Very spacious in deed with a second bedroom full kitchen stove top microwave oven good size fridge. Very good seating area, |Very effective Quiet Air Conditioner. Good shower and bathroom |Close to town

Friendly service.    Room as advertised.    Great rate and accommodating.   Amazing location 👌
Thanks again

Location is great but very tight with a 22ft van. Also extremely muddy and soggy ground. We live in the south west and know it can get very wet in the winter but there should be better drainage. Probably wouldn't stay here again
Great cabins.  Awesome location

If I could rate no stars or minus stars I would. Checked into the park after booking a cabin. When entering the cabin, it was appalling. Couch looked like it was picked up from the tip, ripped, worn out, walls disgusting, dirty with black marks everywhere. Bathroom dirty and mouldy. Kitchen cupboards don't close. Floors uneven and dirty. The worst looking cabin I've ever seen. In serious need of mega TLC, maintenance and cleaning. Walked back to reception, handed them the key and told them how appalling the cabin is. Wasn't offered anything else, paid for multiple nights, no offering any refunds. Walked away, wasn't staying there, no chance. Found another accommodation with a beautiful apartment in the same vicinity. I would NOT recommend booking or staying in a cabin at this place.
It is a Caravan park with a variety of rooms. Well located,  near the beach.

Poorly maintained facilities and just all round disgusting , camp laundry hasn’t been cleaned in a week, camp kitchen hasn’t been cleaned the whole time I’ve been here, there’s a poo in the men’s shower that’s been there for 3 days now and the staff have been notified and nothing has been rectified, some of the staff are lovely but the maintenance of this place is very poor and unclean

I've had a fantastic experience with this business from start to finish. The staff is knowledgeable, friendly, and always goes above and beyond. Their professionalism and attention to detail are unmatched. Highly recommended!
Great cabins, family friendly environment 👍
Had a great time staff where very helpful play ground and ocean not far away
只有客廳有一部冷氣，房間裏沒有。清潔程度一般，感覺殘舊，特別是梳化，不敢坐。床是還可以的。廚具也是要大清洗才能用。因為整個公園是露營區，所以露營氣氛不錯。車可以泊在屋對出，很方便。

Lovely 2 bedroom unit, unit was comfortable, lovely and warm and had everything we needed to cook our meals. Quality crockery,cutlery and cookware. We played air hockey whilst waiting for our washing to wash and dry. Great laundry facilities next to the entertainment area. Staff in the office were very friendly. We really enjoyed our stay

I was not very impressed with the washing machine and dryer situation. One being having to pay just to use them after already paying over $100 a night at a caravan park & two the washing machines destroyed a piece of my clothing and the dryer took my money before i could even turn it on. The buttons are also broken for the dryer, definitely could do with upgrades on both. The room was ok, shower was pretty poor as the area was absolutely tiny and has a horrible shower curtain that touches you whilst in it. The door to the room constantly blows in the wind whilst shut and creates a nonstop banging noise. Lastly, the TV should be thrown out & replaced with something from this century, doesn’t even have chromecast. Honestly for the money I paid I was pretty let down.

Over the years we have stayed at the Warrnambool Discovery Park with my family on numerous occasions. This time we return without our children who are now adults.|The park is our favourite holiday park to stay in Warrnambool, located on Pertobe Road a very short walk to the famous Lake Pertobe children’s playground whereby I used to frequently visit in the summer holidays with my Warrnambool relatives. The breakwater and beach are a short stroll from the park.|This time we booked a Deluxe Two Bedroom Cabin which is relatively new. The layout  is wonderful with all the mod cons and comfortably accommodates for four persons.|The park also caters for caravans with powered sites, campers and also has onsite units available. There is a very large and clean camp kitchen.|Overall we highly recommend the Warrnambool Discovery Park and will definitely be back!
Good family atmosphere
Walking distance to shops and beach.
The polite accommodating patient Torquay through help you if you struggle to reverse your caravan the staff here are very nice will certainly come back here again.
Very friendly and informative staff..onsuite clean..site good...great position able to walk if want to ..
Friendly service. Clean cabin. We were placed behind the service building, which wasn't a problem. Staff were respectful of our presence.

The location is great. We left our booking a bit late and ended up with an ensuite site. My husband is pretty skilled at parking, but even he was challenged by the difficulty of parking our van. Others here said that neighbours had helped them get into position. The sites are generally quite square and small and the “roads” through the park are narrow, further hindering our access. I definitely would not recommend this place to an inexperienced caravaner.
We enjoyed our stay at Discovery Parks.

My partner and I stayed here as our last stop off on our Great Ocean Road trip before heading back to Adelaide. We paid for a powered site to camp on. Facilities were the best we had had all of our trip - really clean toilets and showers, great hot water pressure. The amenities were fantastic - heated pool and an awesome kitchenette with kettle, toaster, microwave, fridge and oven. Even a games room. Also situated in a great location. Highly recommend this location!
Not to bad to stay in a container accommodation, nice skyline during the night.
Not the easiest to drive into if you have other cars waiting to check in but besides that it was pleasant.

We stayed here over a few months while working. The location was great, across the road from the beach and the hot pools are just down the road. Amenities and grounds were always nice and clean.
Only negative is things were stolen from sites like Ebikes, escooters etc even when locked up. Just make sure you lock your things up securely and keep an eye on them. Maybe need cameras or something to stop it from happening repitively.  The staff were lovely and friendly, espically people working on the grounds and cleaning.The manager that served us a few times maybe could be a bit more friendlier though. Would definately stay again, thanks so much

Great customer service.
Ensuite toilet/shower, shower tiny and little mouldy.
Site small. If you have a large set up it won't be suitable. Backing into sites difficult.
Can be noisy with traffic on the main strip.
Clean park.
Overall it's nice but been to better cheaper.
The environment is ok but little bit tight and the staffs are kind and friendly but the WiFi connection isn’t good,hope here’s other good WiFi can use thx🙏
Sites are tight and gets a bit crowded at peak times.
Good experience at the Discovery Park.  The room is an excellent value.  Warrnambool is beautiful, and the beach is right up the road!  We will be back.
Other than the bed being to short, I thought it was a queen but it was a double, it was a great place to stay
all good cabin could use a lick of paint
Sites far to small

Lovely spot spotlessly clean
and calm relaxing day and night
Easy access to all Warrnambool has to offer
Great place to stay.
very good

A very well maintained site, the staff were friendly and helpful in resolving any issues quickly. Good location to enjoy Lake Pertobe amenities and access to beach. A short drive into Warrnambool shopping centre and restaurants.

Would definitely have no problems recommending this holiday park. The facilities, the recreational areas, the pool the showers were amazing. Very Very clean.great staff very knowledgeable about the area. Great price per night. Thankyou so much for a wonderful stay.

I stayed here for 3 nights with my 2 daughters. Room was really clean and tidy. As was the park, my girls loved the pool. It was a short walk to the beach and mini golf. Staff were all friendly, we had issues with the DVD player and they fixed immediately
Awesome park, close to beach and other facilities as well as Warrnambool town also.
Great place to have  a short stay in one of the one bedroom unit.  Very clean and friendly staff ✔️✔️✔️✔️✔️

The ensuite sites are tiny. We arrived at our allocated ensuite site and the van didn’t fit. We were then moved to another site but was very crammed. Our 17ft van just fit but once you roll out awning, it just misses the next van across.

For a nightly rate of $117, the sites should be more generous and properly laid out.
Very good experience and location was also good everything was very good we enjoyed alot
This was a lovely little cabin that had a full equipped kitchen. The WiFi didn't really work well but everything else was great. There was hot water, extra sheets, shampoo, conditioner and soap.

I love our stay here, my son enjoyed the playground and the games room. Our cabin has all the amenities we need except of course bbq that is located in the kitchen.
Would love to come back

Just like home!! services offered top line just a thoroughly enjoyable stay Marrissa the park manager just a gem couldn't help enough and very accommodating and run in to a young lady in the camp kitchen Natarlie so helpful and very polite thanks team brilliant
Location was best but room was dirty and full of mosquitoes. It’s cheap but cheap in services too
The cabin was good for the location.The lady at check-in and check-out were pleasant.
Not bad.
Perfect as usual 💚 although I would be more polite telling people it’s time to close the kitchen but perhaps I take it personally

Room was clean, tidy and exactly what had been advertised. Although there were no kids with us it was a very family friendly environment, and they had a games room along with other amenities. Staff weren’t intrusive - but very helpful. Based on the location alone I would recommend discovery parks, but the room, service and amenities make it a 5 star experience. 😁

The camp kitchen is clean, industrial type ,with heaps of room.
clean amenities with heated floors .  That's a bonus!
It does have a Heated outdoor pool with spa ..... Ahhhh , when the weather allows , ..but it's to cold to jump In ! These are good points

But a negative point ...
Tradies and traffic controllers make lots of noise .. late at night . And very early in the mornings.

I would go back ..  . . Depending on what sites are available.its a good place
Second time here, good location and no reason to complain, our cabin was clean and well stocked with essentials.
Enjoyed our very brief stay. Unfortunately arrived late and no time to explore the surroundings

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Discovery Holiday Park, Warrnambool with my wife as part of our anniversary trip along the Great Ocean Road. This was our first visit to Warrnambool, and I must say, our experience at Discovery Parks exceeded all expectations.

We booked a cabin, which was fully equipped with all the essential amenities to ensure a comfortable stay for visitors. The staff were exceptionally friendly and welcoming, making us feel right at home from the moment we arrived. The park itself is expansive, offering a variety of accommodation options and facilities designed to cater to the needs of all kinds of visitors and tourists.

Although our stay was only for one night, we felt that one day was not enough to fully explore and enjoy everything the park has to offer. From the movie room to the laundry facilities, Discovery Parks ensures that travelers have everything they need for a memorable stay.

I wholeheartedly recommend Discovery Holiday Park to anyone visiting Warrnambool. Whether you're a tourist, traveler, or family seeking accommodation, look no further—this is undoubtedly one of the best stays this region has to offer.

This is NOT a big caravan friendly park. There's hardly enough room to get on and off the site. Caravan, awning and vehicle cannot be on the site next to each other. Have to park vehicle partly on the road. Will not stay at this park again. Not worth one star.
Clean spacious rooms, nice pool and plenty of facilities to entertain kids
Unit is dated but the room is clean. Location is easy to find. Plenty of attractions nearby perfect for kids.

This park has the tightest sites I've seen or been to in any park, and Iv'e been to a few. The bays are very short and the roads are 1 car only wide, so very sqwishy so you block the road completly when parking and positioning your van.
Almost every van site has difficulty in getting your van in.
Would I go back, NO!

Very well equipped camp kitchen, modern and very clean amenities.
I could not find any recycle bins so that's not good, all going to landfill.

Google shows this park being on the western and eastern side of Petrobe Rd. I picked it for the kids thinking we'd have the adventure playground on one side and the beach on the other. This park is only on the eastern side and shipwreck holiday park is on the west. Further that southern part of shipwreck is only open at peak times.

This park is tiny with the tightest sites I've seen. Other guests were complaining about the difficulty they had getting in. The friendly bloke at reception offered to park it. Should have taken him up on his offer.

The only access is through the front gate on Petrobe road. It doesn't make the park poorly located but if you're right at the back it's annoying having to walk back to the road to get anywhere. A pedestrian gate at the rear would sort this. There were also multiple nights you could hear people doing burnouts.

For some reason all the toilets are locked with a combo code which successfully irritates every guest that wants to use the toilet. The chance of an outside visitor using the facilities surely doesn't outweigh the enjoyment of the paying guests. The toilets were all clean and modern.

Overall its a well kept park with friendly staff. There's a high turnover with most people only staying all night. It's a drive into town but a walk to the beach, playground and foreshore.
Very nice and tidy cabins.

Great service. Great location. We've stayed now with caravan and utilising a cabin. The grounds could do with a little TLC (trimming some plants and mowing the grass) but other than that it's a great park that is conveniently located

Booked a 2 bedroom cabin for 5 days assuming a holiday park is good for kids.. this is the worst place we have been..

Dirty pool,,, very small..
Dirty kitchenette,  not cleaned properly after previous cluents
hence we decided to eat outside...
Receptionist is very rude, they provided only one set of toiletries ,not even toilet papers  when we asked for toilet papers on our 4th day they said they don't provide again,
no room cleaning service during our stay....

Not recommended anyone who wish for a nice holiday in a holiday park with kids ,,  there is so many good hotels in warranbool , and you can use public parks , as this holiday park doesn't have anything for kids entertainment ...
Had a great stay  ,will definitely be coming back .

Stayed for a couple of nights. Well located across from the beach. Smallish park but facilities etc were fine. Staff very helpful. On a bus route that gets you into the city in under 10 minutes or could you be walked in 20. Close to Flagstaff Hill.

I was just passing by, stayed over for the hot spring, so it was only one night.

The place was extremely suitable for families, especially large ones. Plenty of room for everyone to roam around. Fully kitted out kitchen, can cook easily or use their community kitchen and BBQ facilities. There's a game room as well.

A few minutes walk to Deep Blue hot spring, terrific location if you're into it. Right next to the beach too, but quite some distance to town centre, so will need to drive to get to any shop or supermarkets.
Had a powered site. Facilities are clean and modern. Prices for off peak are great. Nearby walking tracks and beach a bonus. Friendly office staff.

Very disappointed in this cabin. Floors were dirty there was dirt and sand everywhere.
Hair in the shower beds weren’t made and to top it off no heating as it was “broken”

Came my bus took 6:00 hrs arrived refreshed and book in with good service. Had dinner in town at a cafe. Food was delicious and went back to the room and settled down for the night.  Next morning 🌄 went to the whale nursery and different places throughout the week. When l check out and court the bus back home.
Fantastic location nice rooms for families
Good location, good value for money.

I was here in a motorcycle group ride for a weekend. The map and directions to the unit was great, with a smooth check in. The unit was spotless and appliances were easy to figure out.

I want to bring the family.
A clean and neat cabin. Had all the necessary utensils in the kitchenette. Walking distance to the Deep Blue Hot springs. Bed was comfortable and cabin was warm. Highly recommend!!!
Nice place very peaceful clean room
Lovely spot. Unfortunately kitchen and games room close early at 8pm but the location is awesome and staff is so nice.

Had a great stay here. Based ourselves here for a couple of weeks to explore the surrounding area.
Can't thank Merrisa (Manager) and her staff enough for an incredible cruisy stay. Always accommodating and friendly.
Heated pool, games room and camp kitchen was awesome.
Good sized motel room at a reasonable price. Camp kitchen is also really good, if you choose to use it
This place is great! It is worth a few days to stay. 👍 The first time I moved in I've fallen in love🥰🥰
Front desk girls were happy to help out and wonderful to deal with.
We had an absolute blast and spent a week here with my significant other. Extremely quiet location.  We will definitely be returning but next bringing our adult children with us

This is an excellent place to stay in Warnambool. This holiday park is located outside of the main city/busy areas, and yet it's close to many attractions.

The self-contained cabin we stayed in was clean tidy peaceful with all the amenities for a comfortable stay.

Supermarkets, restaurants, convenience stores and fast food outlets etc, are also located within a short drive from here.

Great reception staff too.
So clean and well kept. Amazing place for families close to attractions and parks.
Best caravan park

My family and I stayed here for the long weekend and it is an amazing place.Location is perfect and walking distance to all the kids fun parks, mini golf and jumping pillow.The overall amenities at the Discovery Park is awesome for families from movie room, laundry service, BBQ cooking area and heated pool with spa.

Such a gem of a place to stay. Great access to local natural Warrnambool and the only reason I didn’t want to give a good review was because I don’t want them to put the price up or be booked out the next time want to go. Nothing fancy but perfect place for a well priced break. Thank you for having me and providing exactly what I needed. Great staff and folks that stay there. I highly recommend for those down to earth folks.
The room was better than I expected for the price. The location is great and the people were helpful
Discovery parks have a lot of activities suitable for family, amenities such as washing machine and dryer and games corner to enjoy the stay.

Excellent caravan park close to all attractions. Level sites with great access. Won 10 night Travel Auctions bid. On arrival (did 5 of 10 nights) we were upgraded to a ensuite site... what a bonus. Great facilities I.e camp kitchen, t.v/games room, laundry ect. Will be back later in year for next 5 nights and hopefully get upgraded to same again. Thanks Lorraine & Alan
Honestly a great place to stay
A great location and nature around it, we met many animals and had a lot of fun.
設施非常殘舊，冷氣機十分嘈吵，基本上無法入睡。好處是木屋外已有個人車位，方便。
Beautiful area, highly recommended!
Great clean ensuite.
Wonderful  place to stay
Camping, gelegen aan de rand van Worm Bay. Op loopafstand van het centrum en vlakbij het openluchtmuseum Flagstaff Hill. Goede voorzieningen
Excellent service and location.
Great location
Amazing place
Love this park clean and has everything except an electric blanket but it was warm so it’s ok.

Great place to stay  for a short time  all the basics  facilities  all there comfortable  beds heaps of space the only negative  is it's very tight  driving  in and out be careful  etc but other  than  that all good  we enjoyed  the stay

We really like staying at this location. Very handy to everything. The caravan park is nice and quiet. All facilities well maintained and clean. The camp kitchen games room laundry and pool areas  and playgrounds are all very neat.

Small small small
Do not come here if you have a decent size van or tow vehicle
Very cramped and if you make it onto your site you can hear everyone’s conversations etc
Would not return
Convenient, spacious and very clean.
Lovely people and place
Beautiful place, nicely equipped, very friendly staff. Everything super tidy and clean. If we have ever a chance to get back we will definitely choose this plave again.

First family caravan outing. Got the ensuite powered site. Perfect fit for my 22ft caravan and Annex with plenty of space to fit the ute in on one site. Highly recommended and great facilities.  Don't hesitate to book ,just do it and you won't regret it. Well done to the staff that keeps the place well maintained.

Great location close to the beach and park. Friendly service from the staff and they were very accommodating (we had our parents stay in their RV with us and they put them right next to the cabin). The cabin was just as expected. The park is compact, but they have a number of things squeezed in like a playground, heated pool and games room.
Just spoke to a lady on the phone here, her name was Karen. And she was quite rude if this place doesn't even deserve one Star Karen you are the rudest person alive and I believe you should be fired.

We loved our stay. Room was what we expected and location was awesome. Only suggestion is better oversight of pool. We went twice and on both occasions parents were arguing and in disagreement over how some kids were using it. In the end we chose the beach.
Easy to check in Great location to where we wanted to go Nice pool
Fantastic caravan park, but a bit tight on room

We had a Powered Site for 3 nights as our base to explore the Great Ocean Road and Portland.
Every Staff member we spoke to we're extremely pleasant.
Wish we could have stayed longer.
Great service,  well appointed park ,
Nice spot, close to the CBD and only a few minutes walk to the beach
Spent a couple of nights here in our motorhome.  Not too far to walk into town or the surf beach.

Was very pleased with this park. Nice and quiet after 10pm, and good central location. Bathrooms and camp kitchen were always clean. Only problem was too many unnecessary outside lights that shone into our tent when trying to sleep. We also did not realise that the kitchen lights go off at 9pm which caught quite a few people off guard who were in the middle of cooking. We unfortunately were there when the pool was closed which was disappointing. We were lucky with our location being in the middle of the park with grass and trees around us.
Great place to stay in Warrnambool. We stayed just for a night and location was very convenient. Deluxe cabin was clean and comfortable. Bathroom bit small but overall good.
Situated central to the beach and🚶‍♀️ board walks. Sites a little tight to get into with a large van  but achievable. Staff exceptional.
Great spot, cheap n clean right near beach and long pathway
Love the location and cabin choices..and treats left in fridge
Good, cabin was as expected and staff were friendly enough.

Staying in an ensuite site we were extremely happy with the park. The park was surprisingly big with some money being spent on it with drainage and a new kids playground. The young fella absolutely loved the new playground and tested it out after some fresh bark chip was installed. The games room was good and even had a free game which was great. The place was so quiet which was great

Check in was so easy and the receptionist was lovely!We found the property map great and located our room easily. My son loved the complimentary snack box!!!Unit was basic but very comfortable. Park facilities were great, kids/games room was a hit with my son, as was the pool! Was a shame the playground was no longer there, but having the Lake Pertobe Adventure Park so close made up for this. Only negative was  Unit 70 the outside light is located too close to the flyscreen door and bangs every time you open it, making it rather difficult to get large items in the door as your car is parked very close to the doorway also.

Great location, friendly staff and extremely clean and modern amenities.
Only 2 issues and that was the school children were running amok in the cabins (not every  cabin had a teacher staying with them). They were slamming doors early in the morning until late at night, playing knock & run on other caravan & cabins.
The other issue was at the back of the park where we were, it was really dark walking to the toilets at night, they were having drains put in (so witches hats around the place) and a speed hump. The main light on the corner wasn't working, we asked for it to be looked at. Unfortunately , I had already tripped & fell over as I couldn't see. We were told, we'll try to get someone to look at it...and then they won't replace it as the lights are being replaced by solar lights. All the others in the park were working 🤷 and what about the safety of the customers. Not good enough 😞

Great place to stay, rooms are very clean and spacious.
Private kitchen great price. Friendly staff.
Will definitely be back thanks again.
Sandra is the legend gonna save your days
And so much to see and do in the area.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. All the staff were very friendly and welcoming. We changed our booking to come forward by 1 day and this was done with ease. All the facilities were clean and tidy and modern and the park has lots of grass and clean sites. Park is a great location, close to parks and the beach whilst also being a short drive to the hustle and bustle of Warrnambool. Will definitely stay here again.
Great park, nice comfortable powered sites
Excellent location.  Close to supermarket.  Very clean and good service. Coffee truck right at the entrance was a great plus!

Not bad considering the pros and cons...

What I Liked

Location - is excellent because all amenities are nearby e.g. cafe, restaurants, mini golf, Petrobe park, go karting, arcade games, beach, Maritime museum by walk... and a few minutes drive to central shopping centre and Coles/Woollies.

Room - was good, comfy and room temperature at the time of arrival, well ventilated.

Clean - was neat and tidy, inside and outside.

What I Disliked

Service - room service was not done and neither asked about during our entire 3-days stay.

Bathroom - only one tube of shampoo, conditioner, body wash, body lotion was provided to a 3-person family.

WiFi - it didn't work and we were told that a lot of people might be on it, quite a lame excuse instead of getting better internet provider, better powerful equipment and higher bandwidth for all guests.

Movie room - wasn't operational as it wasn't serviced until we complained about it and it was opened the very next day.

Noise levels - a little high due to AFL grand final and then a caravan just parked right outside our room the next day.

We had such a great stay. The location was convenient...within walking distance to the beach, mini golf, and the fabulous Pertobe Park adventure playground. Our kids received a free welcome pack, and the managers kindly donate all proceeds from go-cart hire to flood victims. Our ensuite site was clean and modern with plenty of space for our large camper. We loved the herb garden and were able to use some herbs in our camp cooking. Thank you for a great stay.
Nice friendly kid happy park play ground and beaches close by

Tidy park, clean, but the cooking facilities need to open so much earlier than what they do. We were all ready with breakfast in hand to cook up at 7.30 and the kitchen and even tables were not available. Pool is nice but not heated. Not really much going on for kids here. Their playground was very close to the main rd so I didn't feel comfortable letting the kids run off and play there. Was happy to stay just the one night however and great for a travelling stop over. Very affordable, compared to other discovery parks, this was upper middle of the range in regards to facilities. A few any-time accessible picnic tables would have gone a long way. When the kitchen is open however very good facilities and extremely clean, even took a photo of it I was so impressed.
Sites way to small for bigger vans and roadways narrow for moveability
Lovely caravan park. Not much of a view, but close to the sea. Ablutions a bit basic, but we'll maintained and clean.
Great place very comfortable 👌

Said in Last years review that I would be back and my wife and I were. Just wanted to relax and unwind and it was exactly what we did from day 1 until the day we left Stayed for a week this time and again could not fault this place. Room we stayed in this time was  absolutely fantastic. Place was so well maintained. Could not fault it. Staff again so friendly and helpful.  What a fantastic place to stay. Would recommend this place to anyone and we will definitely be staying again. Thank you, Thank you Thank You.❤❤❤❤❤
Love this place and we are going back.

overall pleasant, floor was a bit sticky. proche des choses interessantes, mais c'est un peu ancien, meme si le frigidaire et la douche sont récents. ils ont laissé la clé pour nous dans une boite parce qu'on faisait une betisse (on est arrivé tard!).
small muddy ensuite site. needs hard ground covers

Worst discovery park I've stayed in. Outdated cabin, cobwebs everywhere, security door that locks from outside not inside. So dumb. Cabin backs up to a tennis centre that is loud all hours of the day. Low quality wifi, may as well not had any. On checkout I advised that the freezer is broken and I had to throw everything I had out. Her response was oh no!!!!
Worst customer service ever experienced from a senior who should know better.
Only good thing was comfy bed.

We purchased a Travel Auction 3 day stay & we were very surprised when we saw our accommodation!

We stayed in 'Cabin' 110 & this is a fully equipped Unit. We could live in it quite happily!

•TV with 6 metal chairs (my only negative as they were incredibly uncomfortable).
•4 seater 'L' shaped couch. TV on wall.
•Kitchen with microwave, gas 4 burner cooktop & oven. All utensils, non-stick frypan and a plastic bowl & metal bowl etc
•Fridge with separate freezer
•2 bedrooms. One room with Queen bed (very comfortable) & built-in robe and bedside lights. This room has a TV on the wall. Other room also has a robe and a comfortable bunk bed (bottom bunk is a double bed) with sturdy ladder to access top bed. Comfy warm bedding.
•Small bathroom with a roomy shower with good pressure (hot water takes a few minutes) & basin with drawer and shelf. Big mirror. Hair-dryer & tissues.
• Large undercover verandah with table & 6 chairs.
•2 steps to enter unit

The park is spacious, very clean and well equipped.
We stayed in a powered site with ensuite beautiful clean park good amenities and great staff I would recommend this park to travellers.
Just excellent in every single track 👌
我住的房間比較舊，很多角落的塵埃和蜘蛛網未有清潔，有年輕房客對我們大叫
Friendly staff
Great service and staff cabin was modern and spotless
Nice and clean
Very expensive over the kings birthday long weekend,motels are pretty standard,quiet small,electric hotplate was handy plus afew ourdoor bbq's

A few minor defects in the cabin but overall great. We asked the price to stay another night and were given the full RRP of $249 for a dirty cabin in the off-season. Does not make sense so we won't be staying there again.
